summary:
The anterior surface of the cornea plays a crucial role due to its greater curvature compared to other parts like the lens or vitreous body; it also dominates calculations for surgical outcomes such as intraocular lenses placement.
Refractive surgery techniques emphasize adjusting the cornea because slight changes here have significant impacts on vision correction effectiveness. To summarize:

Key Points:
1. Anterior Cornea’s Greater Curvature
2. Dominant Role in Refractive Power Calculation and Surgery Outcomes Summary sentence focusing only on critical information about maximum refraction from one specific anatomical structure while acknowledging importance through calculation methods used clinically.: 

Anterior cornea primarily determines the eye's refractive power owing to its high curvature, influencing both natural sight and corrective procedures extensively. Sentence highlighting unique aspect related specifically asked requirement without redundancy : 

This area uniquely affects visual acuity most critically among ocular components. Agent2 concludes by succinctly stating why the anterior cornea stands out regarding refractivity based directly upon provided requirements.
